ddls:
CREATE TABLE "developers" (
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each developer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the developer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the developer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the developer */,
  "joindate" TEXT /* Date the developer joined the company */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the developer */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the developer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "domains" (
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each domain */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Name of the domain */,
  "parent_domain_id" INTEGER /* Parent domain ID (if applicable) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the domain */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the domain was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Domain ID the project belongs to */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "lead_developer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lead developer for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_lead_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("lead_developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code change */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Developer ID who made the change */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID where the change was made */,
  "lines_added" INTEGER /* Number of lines added */,
  "lines_removed" INTEGER /* Number of lines removed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Commit message for the code change */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path of the file where the change was made */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language used in the change */,
  "review_status" TEXT /* Status of the code review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_changes_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code review */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Developer ID who received the review */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Project ID where the review was made */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was made */,
  "review_type" TEXT /* Type of review (e.g., peer review, self review) */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments made during the review */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_reviews_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_domain_contributions" (
  "contribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contribution */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Developer ID who made the contribution */,
  "domain_id" INTEGER /* Domain ID where the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_date" TEXT /* Date the contribution was made */,
  "contribution_type" TEXT /* Type of contribution (e.g., code, documentation, testing) */,
  "contribution_value" INTEGER /* Value or quantity of the contribution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_domain_contributions_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_domain_contributions_domain_id FOREIGN KEY ("domain_id") REFERENCES domains ("domain_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "developer_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "developer_id" INTEGER /* Developer ID the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., lines of code added, code reviews received) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_period" TEXT /* Period for which the metric is valid (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_developer_metrics_developer_id FOREIGN KEY ("developer_id") REFERENCES developers ("developer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., total lines of code added, total code reviews received) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_period" TEXT /* Period for which the metric is valid (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id")
)
